place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Islands-View Pavilion Villa, Taling Ngam
blurb: A minimalist two-pavilion villa on the quiet south-west coast, framing 180-degree views of the Five Islands and Ang Thong Marine Park — folding glass walls, a 7.3-metre infinity pool, a shady Banyan tree and direct beach access for unforgettable sunsets.
detail:
One of five villas within The Headlands, this private four-bedroom escape blends seamlessly with the tropical nature around it — unmatched in privacy, minimalist luxury and breathtaking sea views. Designed across two levels and two pavilions, it faces the famous Five Islands and Ang Thong National Marine Park, making it a magical backdrop for vibrant sunsets, and is equally suited to honeymooners or families with children.

The pavilions hold four en-suite bedrooms in signature neutral tones, a large open-plan living and dining area and a fully equipped kitchen, with the folding glass doors opening both pavilions to the cool sea breeze and an effortless indoor-outdoor flow. Lounge areas abound — a circular sofa on the upper terrace, a sun deck and atrium, a lower lounge for napping in the sun, and a 7.3-metre infinity pool with a traditional Thai massage spot on the deck beside it, all shaded by a magnificent Banyan tree.

Direct beach access leads to a quiet shore for snorkelling and kayaking, with a jetty nearby for sunset and the InterContinental resort just along the coast for dining. The villa is fully staffed with a villa manager (and chef on request), with a welcome drink, daily breakfast, return airport transfers and beachside restaurant shuttles included.

features.l: Shaded by a grand Banyan tree
